task_completion.description: Log into the vtiger CRM application
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the vtiger CRM interface loaded in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Update stale deals to 'Closed Lost' with 0% probability
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Deals/Opportunities list or detail views showing deals with past closing dates updated to a Sales Stage of 'Closed Lost' and a Probability of '0'.

task_completion.description: Change status of Closed Critical/Urgent tickets to Resolved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Support Tickets list or detail views showing tickets with 'Critical' severity or 'Urgent' priority having their Status updated to 'Resolved'.

task_completion.description: Prepend SLA-AUDIT string to ticket descriptions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the ticket detail or edit views showing the description field starting exactly with '[SLA-AUDIT] Reclassified from Closed to Resolved per Q1 hygiene protocol. '
Screenshots of the Accounts list or detail view showing an account named 'Blackstone Industrial' with the Industry field set to 'Industrial Machinery & Equipment'.

Screenshots of the 'Blackstone Industrial' account detail or edit view showing the Description field containing 'Enterprise client specializing in industrial automation and factory systems integration.'

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to interact with the CRM
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating and clicking through a web browser (e.g., Chromium) rather than using terminal commands (like curl or mysql) to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual CRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: Text entry for descriptions and fields occurs within the vtiger CRM web interface input fields, not in an external text editor or script.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine page loads, form submissions, and save confirmations without the browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to superficially alter the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected industry for the account is 'Industrial Machinery & Equipment'. The expected account description is 'Enterprise client specializing in industrial automation and factory systems integration.'. The expected ticket SLA marker in the description is '[SLA-AUDIT]'. Note: The target account 'Blackstone Industrial' does not exist in the initial seed data, so the agent must create it from scratch to fulfill the account update requirement.
